name_en: In stock 🔥 Iconic square Baguette mini bag from the Versace by Fendi series. Gold leather material, featuring gold laser-punched FF pattern, resembling Versace metal mesh. Three Medusa metal pins adorn the front flap. FF closure features a pin. Magnetic closure, FF fabric lined interior compartment, interior pocket, and gold-finish metal hardware. Equipped with a long handle and detachable shoulder strap, for underarm carry or crossbody. 8BS066LM900
